  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) system is implemented across multiple key components:\n\n## Core ILM Engine\n**IndexLifecycleService** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleService.java) - The main service that triggers policy evaluation on a periodic schedule. It monitors cluster state changes and initiates lifecycle transitions for indices matching a policy.\n\n**IndexLifecycleRunner** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleRunner.java) - Executes the actual policy steps for indices by obtaining the appropriate step from the registry and running it.\n\n**PolicyStepsRegistry** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/PolicyStepsRegistry.java) - Registry that builds and caches step instances for each phase and action in the lifecycle policy.\n\n## Policy Model\n**LifecyclePolicy** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicy.java) - The core model class representing a complete lifecycle policy with phases and their execution constraints. Policies are made up of phases which move through in sequence based on index age and conditions.\n\n**Phase** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Phase.java) - Represents a set of lifecycle actions to be executed at a specific point in an index's lifecycle, with a minimum age constraint.\n\n**LifecyclePolicyMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicyMetadata.java) - Metadata wrapper for policies stored in cluster state.\n\n## Action Handlers\n**TransportPutLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportPutLifecycleAction.java) - Handles creation and updates of lifecycle policies. Validates policies against the applicable lifecycle type and stores them in cluster metadata.\n\n**TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java) - Handles deletion of lifecycle policies from cluster metadata.\n\n## Step Execution Framework\n**Step** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Step.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM steps with step key identification and transition information.\n\n**ClusterStateActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/ClusterStateActionStep.java) - Abstract base for synchronous steps that update cluster state. Implements the performAction method for cluster state modifications.\n\n**AsyncWaitStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncWaitStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that wait for a condition to become true. These steps are called periodically and check conditions that may take time to satisfy.\n\n**AsyncActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncActionStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that perform actions requiring time to complete (e.g., API calls). Maintains a client reference for async operations.\n\n## Execution State Management\n**LifecycleExecutionState** (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/LifecycleExecutionState.java) - A record class stored in index metadata custom settings (under the key 'ilm') containing the complete execution state: current phase, action, step, failure information, timestamps, and step-specific data like snapshot repository and index names. Serializes to/from custom metadata for persistence.\n\n**LifecycleExecutionStateUtils** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleExecutionStateUtils.java) - Utility class for manipulating and updating LifecycleExecutionState objects during step transitions.\n\n## Cluster State Updates\n**ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** - Updates cluster state to execute the next step.\n**MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** - Transitions an index to the next step in the lifecycle.\n**MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** - Moves an index to the error step if policy application fails.\n**SetStepInfoUpdateTask** - Updates step-specific info in the execution state.\n\n## Supporting Infrastructure\n**IndexLifecycleMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/IndexLifecycleMetadata.java) - Container for all ILM-related metadata in cluster state, including policies and operation mode.\n\n**LifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleAction.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM actions (allocate, delete, rollover, shrink, force_merge, read_only, etc.)\n\nThe system coordinates through cluster state listeners, with IndexLifecycleService detecting policy-eligible indices and IndexLifecycleRunner orchestrating step execution. Each step modifies the LifecycleExecutionState in index metadata, enabling persistence across cluster restarts and enabling other nodes to observe and resume policy execution.\n"

Report each file path and key class.

## Key Components Identified:

### **Core Engine**
- **IndexLifecycleService** - Triggers policy evaluation on a periodic schedule
- **IndexLifecycleRunner** - Executes policy steps for indices
- **PolicyStepsRegistry** - Builds and caches step instances

### **Policy Model Classes**
- **LifecyclePolicy** - Complete lifecycle policy with phases and constraints
- **Phase** - Set of actions at a specific lifecycle point
- **LifecyclePolicyMetadata** - Metadata wrapper for cluster state

### **Action Handlers**
- **TransportPutLifecycleAction** - Creates/updates lifecycle policies
- **TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** - Deletes lifecycle policies

### **Step Execution Framework**
- **Step** - Base class for all ILM steps
- **ClusterStateActionStep** - Synchronous cluster state modification steps
- **AsyncWaitStep** - Asynchronous condition-checking steps
- **AsyncActionStep** - Asynchronous action-performing steps

### **Execution State**
- **LifecycleExecutionState** - Record stored in index metadata tracking current phase, action, step, failures, timestamps, and step-specific data

## File Locations:
- **x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/** - 44 Java files implementing the ILM plugin
- **x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/** - 108 Java files for core ILM model and actions
- **server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/** - LifecycleExecutionState and DataStreamLifecycle

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) system is implemented across multiple key components:\n\n## Core ILM Engine\n**IndexLifecycleService** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleService.java) - The main service that triggers policy evaluation on a periodic schedule. It monitors cluster state changes and initiates lifecycle transitions for indices matching a policy.\n\n**IndexLifecycleRunner** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleRunner.java) - Executes the actual policy steps for indices by obtaining the appropriate step from the registry and running it.\n\n**PolicyStepsRegistry** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/PolicyStepsRegistry.java) - Registry that builds and caches step instances for each phase and action in the lifecycle policy.\n\n## Policy Model\n**LifecyclePolicy** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicy.java) - The core model class representing a complete lifecycle policy with phases and their execution constraints. Policies are made up of phases which move through in sequence based on index age and conditions.\n\n**Phase** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Phase.java) - Represents a set of lifecycle actions to be executed at a specific point in an index's lifecycle, with a minimum age constraint.\n\n**LifecyclePolicyMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicyMetadata.java) - Metadata wrapper for policies stored in cluster state.\n\n## Action Handlers\n**TransportPutLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportPutLifecycleAction.java) - Handles creation and updates of lifecycle policies. Validates policies against the applicable lifecycle type and stores them in cluster metadata.\n\n**TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java) - Handles deletion of lifecycle policies from cluster metadata.\n\n## Step Execution Framework\n**Step** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Step.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM steps with step key identification and transition information.\n\n**ClusterStateActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/ClusterStateActionStep.java) - Abstract base for synchronous steps that update cluster state. Implements the performAction method for cluster state modifications.\n\n**AsyncWaitStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncWaitStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that wait for a condition to become true. These steps are called periodically and check conditions that may take time to satisfy.\n\n**AsyncActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncActionStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that perform actions requiring time to complete (e.g., API calls). Maintains a client reference for async operations.\n\n## Execution State Management\n**LifecycleExecutionState** (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/LifecycleExecutionState.java) - A record class stored in index metadata custom settings (under the key 'ilm') containing the complete execution state: current phase, action, step, failure information, timestamps, and step-specific data like snapshot repository and index names. Serializes to/from custom metadata for persistence.\n\n**LifecycleExecutionStateUtils** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleExecutionStateUtils.java) - Utility class for manipulating and updating LifecycleExecutionState objects during step transitions.\n\n## Cluster State Updates\n**ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** - Updates cluster state to execute the next step.\n**MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** - Transitions an index to the next step in the lifecycle.\n**MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** - Moves an index to the error step if policy application fails.\n**SetStepInfoUpdateTask** - Updates step-specific info in the execution state.\n\n## Supporting Infrastructure\n**IndexLifecycleMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/IndexLifecycleMetadata.java) - Container for all ILM-related metadata in cluster state, including policies and operation mode.\n\n**LifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleAction.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM actions (allocate, delete, rollover, shrink, force_merge, read_only, etc.)\n\nThe system coordinates through cluster state listeners, with IndexLifecycleService detecting policy-eligible indices and IndexLifecycleRunner orchestrating step execution. Each step modifies the LifecycleExecutionState in index metadata, enabling persistence across cluster restarts and enabling other nodes to observe and resume policy execution.\n"
}

  "text": "The Elasticsearch Index Lifecycle Management (ILM) system is implemented across multiple key components:\n\n## Core ILM Engine\n**IndexLifecycleService** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleService.java) - The main service that triggers policy evaluation on a periodic schedule. It monitors cluster state changes and initiates lifecycle transitions for indices matching a policy.\n\n**IndexLifecycleRunner** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/IndexLifecycleRunner.java) - Executes the actual policy steps for indices by obtaining the appropriate step from the registry and running it.\n\n**PolicyStepsRegistry** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/PolicyStepsRegistry.java) - Registry that builds and caches step instances for each phase and action in the lifecycle policy.\n\n## Policy Model\n**LifecyclePolicy** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicy.java) - The core model class representing a complete lifecycle policy with phases and their execution constraints. Policies are made up of phases which move through in sequence based on index age and conditions.\n\n**Phase** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Phase.java) - Represents a set of lifecycle actions to be executed at a specific point in an index's lifecycle, with a minimum age constraint.\n\n**LifecyclePolicyMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecyclePolicyMetadata.java) - Metadata wrapper for policies stored in cluster state.\n\n## Action Handlers\n**TransportPutLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportPutLifecycleAction.java) - Handles creation and updates of lifecycle policies. Validates policies against the applicable lifecycle type and stores them in cluster metadata.\n\n**TransportDeleteLifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/ilm/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/ilm/action/TransportDeleteLifecycleAction.java) - Handles deletion of lifecycle policies from cluster metadata.\n\n## Step Execution Framework\n**Step** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/Step.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM steps with step key identification and transition information.\n\n**ClusterStateActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/ClusterStateActionStep.java) - Abstract base for synchronous steps that update cluster state. Implements the performAction method for cluster state modifications.\n\n**AsyncWaitStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncWaitStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that wait for a condition to become true. These steps are called periodically and check conditions that may take time to satisfy.\n\n**AsyncActionStep** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/AsyncActionStep.java) - Abstract base for asynchronous steps that perform actions requiring time to complete (e.g., API calls). Maintains a client reference for async operations.\n\n## Execution State Management\n**LifecycleExecutionState** (server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/cluster/metadata/LifecycleExecutionState.java) - A record class stored in index metadata custom settings (under the key 'ilm') containing the complete execution state: current phase, action, step, failure information, timestamps, and step-specific data like snapshot repository and index names. Serializes to/from custom metadata for persistence.\n\n**LifecycleExecutionStateUtils** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleExecutionStateUtils.java) - Utility class for manipulating and updating LifecycleExecutionState objects during step transitions.\n\n## Cluster State Updates\n**ExecuteStepsUpdateTask** - Updates cluster state to execute the next step.\n**MoveToNextStepUpdateTask** - Transitions an index to the next step in the lifecycle.\n**MoveToErrorStepUpdateTask** - Moves an index to the error step if policy application fails.\n**SetStepInfoUpdateTask** - Updates step-specific info in the execution state.\n\n## Supporting Infrastructure\n**IndexLifecycleMetadata** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/IndexLifecycleMetadata.java) - Container for all ILM-related metadata in cluster state, including policies and operation mode.\n\n**LifecycleAction** (x-pack/plugin/core/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/xpack/core/ilm/LifecycleAction.java) - Base abstract class for all ILM actions (allocate, delete, rollover, shrink, force_merge, read_only, etc.)\n\nThe system coordinates through cluster state listeners, with IndexLifecycleService detecting policy-eligible indices and IndexLifecycleRunner orchestrating step execution. Each step modifies the LifecycleExecutionState in index metadata, enabling persistence across cluster restarts and enabling other nodes to observe and resume policy execution.\n"
}
